Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5209/swagger/v1/swagger.json --max-time 10 | python -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
paths = d.get\('paths', {}\)
schemas = d.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)
for p in sorted\(paths\):
    if 'menu' in p.lower\(\):
        for m in paths[p]:
            op = paths[p][m]
            print\(f'{m.upper\(\):8s} {p}'\)
            print\(json.dumps\(op, indent=2\)\)
            print\(\)
print\('=== Relevant Schemas ==='\)
for name in sorted\(schemas\):
    if 'menu' in name.lower\(\):
        print\(f'\\n--- {name} ---'\)
        print\(json.dumps\(schemas[name], indent=2\)\)
")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "192.168.10.131\\KPIDATAWH" -U sa -P "P@ssw0rd" -d IMP_DB -Q "
-- Insert ADMIN_MENUS menu under ADMIN parent
IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM [imp].[Menu] WHERE [MenuCode] = 'ADMIN_MENUS'\)
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO [imp].[Menu] \([ParentId], [MenuCode], [MenuName], [Icon], [Route], [SortOrder]\)
    VALUES \(
        \(SELECT [Id] FROM [imp].[Menu] WHERE [MenuCode] = 'ADMIN'\),
        'ADMIN_MENUS', N'จัดการเมนู', 'Menu', '/admin/menus', 4
    \)
    PRINT 'Menu ADMIN_MENUS inserted.'
END
ELSE
    PRINT 'Menu ADMIN_MENUS already exists.'

-- Grant Admin role full permission on the new menu
DECLARE @AdminRoleId INT = \(SELECT [Id] FROM [imp].[Roles] WHERE [RoleName] = 'Admin'\)
DECLARE @MenuId INT = \(SELECT [Id] FROM [imp].[Menu] WHERE [MenuCode] = 'ADMIN_MENUS'\)

IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM [imp].[RoleMenuPermissions] WHERE [RoleId] = @AdminRoleId AND [MenuId] = @MenuId\)
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO [imp].[RoleMenuPermissions] \([RoleId], [MenuId], [Visible], [CanCreate], [CanEdit], [CanReadOnly], [CanDelete]\)
    VALUES \(@AdminRoleId, @MenuId, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1\)
    PRINT 'Admin permission for ADMIN_MENUS granted.'
END
ELSE
    PRINT 'Admin permission for ADMIN_MENUS already exists.'
" 2>&1)

Bash(sqlcmd -S "192.168.10.131\\KPIDATAWH" -U sa -P "P@ssw0rd" -d IMP_DB -Q "
SELECT m.Id, m.ParentId, m.MenuCode, m.MenuName, m.Icon, m.Route, m.SortOrder, m.IsActive
FROM [imp].[Menu] m
WHERE m.ParentId = \(SELECT Id FROM [imp].[Menu] WHERE MenuCode = 'ADMIN'\)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5209/swagger/v1/swagger.json --max-time 10 | python -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
schemas = d.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)
for name in ['UserListItem', 'AssignRoleRequest', 'RoleListItem']:
    if name in schemas:
        print\(f'--- {name} ---'\)
        print\(json.dumps\(schemas[name], indent=2\)\)
        print\(\)
# Also look for any user-related response schemas
for name in sorted\(schemas\):
    if name not in ['CreateUserRequest', 'UpdateUserRequest'] and \('user' in name.lower\(\) or 'role' in name.lower\(\) or 'assign' in name.lower\(\)\):
        print\(f'--- {name} ---'\)
        print\(json.dumps\(schemas[name], indent=2\)\)
        print\(\)
")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "192.168.10.131\\KPIDATAWH" -U sa -P "P@ssw0rd" -d IMP_DB -Q "
IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'imp' AND TABLE_NAME = 'UserMenuPermissions'\)
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE [imp].[UserMenuPermissions] \(
        [Id]            INT IDENTITY\(1,1\)   NOT NULL,
        [UserId]        UNIQUEIDENTIFIER    NOT NULL,
        [MenuId]        INT                 NOT NULL,
        [Visible]       BIT                 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
        [CanCreate]     BIT                 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
        [CanEdit]       BIT                 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
        [CanReadOnly]   BIT                 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
        [CanDelete]     BIT                 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
        CONSTRAINT [PK_imp_UserMenuPermissions] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED \([Id]\),
        CONSTRAINT [FK_imp_UserMenuPermissions_Users] FOREIGN KEY \([UserId]\)
            REFERENCES [imp].[Users] \([Id]\) ON DELETE CASCADE,
        CONSTRAINT [FK_imp_UserMenuPermissions_Menu] FOREIGN KEY \([MenuId]\)
            REFERENCES [imp].[Menu] \([Id]\) ON DELETE CASCADE,
        CONSTRAINT [UQ_imp_UserMenuPermissions_UserMenu] UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED \([UserId], [MenuId]\)
    \)
    PRINT 'Table imp.UserMenuPermissions created.'
END
ELSE
    PRINT 'Table imp.UserMenuPermissions already exists.'
" 2>&1)

Bash(sqlcmd -S "192.168.10.131\\KPIDATAWH" -U sa -P "P@ssw0rd" -d IMP_DB -Q "
DECLARE @AdminRoleId INT = \(SELECT [Id] FROM [imp].[Roles] WHERE [RoleName] = 'Admin'\)

-- Check which menus don't have Admin permission yet
SELECT m.Id, m.MenuCode, m.MenuName
FROM [imp].[Menu] m
WHERE NOT EXISTS \(
    SELECT 1 FROM [imp].[RoleMenuPermissions] rmp
    WHERE rmp.[RoleId] = @AdminRoleId AND rmp.[MenuId] = m.[Id]
\)
ORDER BY m.Id
" -W 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/_dev/_2026_workshop/_refund_ai/_sorcecode/imp-api" && sqlcmd -S "192.168.10.131\\KPIDATAWH" -U sa -P "P@ssw0rd" -d IMP_DB -Q "
-- Shift existing menus to make room for new menu at SortOrder=2
UPDATE imp.Menu SET SortOrder = SortOrder + 1 WHERE ParentId IS NULL AND SortOrder >= 2 AND SortOrder < 99;

-- Insert new FILE_DATA menu
IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM imp.Menu WHERE MenuCode = 'FILE_DATA'\)
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO imp.Menu \(MenuCode, MenuName, Icon, Route, SortOrder\)
    VALUES \('FILE_DATA', N'แฟ้มข้อมูล', 'FolderArchive', '/file-data', 2\);
END

-- Grant Admin role full permissions on new menu
DECLARE @AdminRoleId INT = \(SELECT Id FROM imp.Roles WHERE RoleName = 'Admin'\);
INSERT INTO imp.RoleMenuPermissions \(RoleId, MenuId, Visible, CanCreate, CanEdit, CanReadOnly, CanDelete\)
SELECT @AdminRoleId, m.Id, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1
FROM imp.Menu m
WHERE m.MenuCode = 'FILE_DATA'
AND NOT EXISTS \(
    SELECT 1 FROM imp.RoleMenuPermissions rmp
    WHERE rmp.RoleId = @AdminRoleId AND rmp.MenuId = m.Id
\);

-- Verify
SELECT Id, ParentId, MenuCode, MenuName, SortOrder FROM imp.Menu WHERE ParentId IS NULL ORDER BY SortOrder;
" -y 30 -Y 20 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
import xlrd
wb = xlrd.open_workbook\(r'D:\\_dev\\_2026_workshop\\_refund_ai\\_phototype\\TaxRefund_Excel\\Export_010126_To310126.xls'\)
sh = wb.sheet_by_index\(0\)
print\(f'Sheet: {sh.name}'\)
print\(f'Rows: {sh.nrows}, Cols: {sh.ncols}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== HEADERS ==='\)
for i in range\(sh.ncols\):
    print\(f'  [{i}] {sh.cell_value\(0, i\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== ROW 1 ==='\)
for i in range\(sh.ncols\):
    c = sh.cell\(1, i\)
    print\(f'  [{i}] {repr\(c.value\)}  \(type={c.ctype}\)'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== ROW 2 ==='\)
for i in range\(sh.ncols\):
    c = sh.cell\(2, i\)
    print\(f'  [{i}] {repr\(c.value\)}  \(type={c.ctype}\)'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import xlrd
wb = xlrd.open_workbook\(r'D:\\_dev\\_2026_workshop\\_refund_ai\\_phototype\\TaxRefund_Excel\\Export_010126_To310126.xls', encoding_override='cp874'\)
sh = wb.sheet_by_index\(0\)
print\(f'Sheet: {sh.name}'\)
print\(f'Rows: {sh.nrows}, Cols: {sh.ncols}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== HEADERS \(0-based index\) ==='\)
for i in range\(sh.ncols\):
    print\(f'  [{i}] {sh.cell_value\(0, i\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== ROW 1 \(first data row\) ==='\)
for i in range\(sh.ncols\):
    c = sh.cell\(1, i\)
    tname = {0:'empty',1:'text',2:'number',3:'date',4:'boolean',5:'error',6:'blank'}.get\(c.ctype,'?'\)
    print\(f'  [{i}] {repr\(c.value\)}  \(type={tname}\)'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== ROW 2 \(second data row\) ==='\)
for i in range\(sh.ncols\):
    c = sh.cell\(2, i\)
    tname = {0:'empty',1:'text',2:'number',3:'date',4:'boolean',5:'error',6:'blank'}.get\(c.ctype,'?'\)
    print\(f'  [{i}] {repr\(c.value\)}  \(type={tname}\)'\)
" 2>&1)
